regulations.title: Portuguese Carbon Tax on Industrial Emissions
regulations.summary: APA registered 10 December; December metering: 148 tCO2e; annual declaration due 31 March 2026.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Packaging audit commissioned from Inovação em Embalagem; SIGRE Lisbon pilot registration pending.

regulations.title: Portuguese Deposit-Return Scheme
regulations.summary: National DRS committed for containers >300ml by 2028; SIGRE pilot Q2 2026; Terra Verde invited as founding member.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Tropical fruit concentrates not listed; Brazil/Peru sourcing flagged high-risk; proactive supplier declarations recommended.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: BDO Portugal engaged; ESRS gap analysis initiated; FY2025 first report due June 2026.
